assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, IdentityRole>() with AddEntityFrameworkStores<ApplicationDbContext>() to register ASP.NET Identity
Program.cs calls AddIdentityServer() followed by .AddAspNetIdentity<ApplicationUser>() to bridge ASP.NET Identity to IdentityServer
Response explains that AddAspNetIdentity registers IProfileService for adding claims to tokens
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states AddAspNetIdentity registers 'IProfileService — Uses IUserClaimsPrincipalFactory to add claims from the ASP.NET Identity user to tokens.'

assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes AddDefaultTokenProviders() on the ASP.NET Identity registration
assertions.rationale: Line 14 includes .AddDefaultTokenProviders() in the AddIdentity chain.
